data.name: Refuge of Embers
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in hand-illustrated fantasy world that draws you deeper into the story. Refuge of Embers follows the renamable main character Harth as the world he knows gives way to change that causes him to discover a deeper purpose. Harth lives a simple life with his friends in a remote frontier village. Events eventually lead him to Pyre, the enormous capital city where he encounters unusual new situations. How will Harth and his friends react to the strange new world they find themselves in?

Meet and romance a large cast of characters, each with their own distinct personalities, backgrounds, and motives. Forge deep connections with them as you navigate the complexities of their relationships. What will the characters you meet think of the choices you make, and how will that change your relationship with them?

With an intricate web of choices and consequences, unlock various endings that reflect the impact of your decisions. The decisions that you make may even lead to different flavors of endings with the same characters depending on how you choose to act around them. Replay the game to experience alternative storylines and unlock all possible outcomes.

Unravel the many mysteries and secrets scattered throughout the story to unveil more about the lore and background of the game. Character accessories, hidden messages, and even entire bonus scenes will await you as you find objects hidden throughout the game and explore menus. How many secrets will you find?

Easily enable or disable adult content at any time, including:

  • Impregnation

  • X-Ray View

  • Femdom

  • Harem

  • And more...

data.short_description: Hand drawn visual novel with complex sprites, cinematic scenes, and frame-by-frame drawn animated h-scenes. Refuge of Embers features a wide cast of characters to romance and multiple endings in an original fantasy setting. Adult content can be toggled to your preference.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64 Bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo / AMD Zen Series
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 / OpenGL 4.1 Capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Weird issues on late 2000s Intel Xeon CPUs
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X Snow Leopard 10.6 (64 Bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2 / DirectX 9 / OpenGL ES 2 / WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Debian 12 / Steam OS 2.0 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo / AMD Zen Series
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Weird issues on late 2000s Intel Xeon CPUs
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: TempleOS
  • 記憶體: 420 GB 記憶體

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64 Bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo / AMD Zen Series
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 / OpenGL 4.1 Capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Weird issues on late 2000s Intel Xeon CPUs

Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Mac OS X Snow Leopard 10.6 (64 Bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2 / DirectX 9 / OpenGL ES 2 / WebGL
  • Storage: 5 GB available space

  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
